title: orthosiphon tomentosus var. glabratus
intro: Orthosiphon tomentosus var. glabratus, also known as Asian or Chinese Orthosiphon, is a type of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Orthosiphon tomentosus var. glabratus include relief from urinary tract issues, improved kidney function, and potential reduction in blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In traditional medicine, the plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
